tools.name: ax-integration-patch-config
tools.description: Apply an RFC 6902 patch to a Hujson config file, preserving comments

dry-run.description: emit the envelope without side effects

idempotency-key.description: opaque key used to prevent duplicate-create retries

name.description: name to include in each streamed item
